channel.title: Title on Kiarash Azarnia
channel.description: Recent content in Title on Kiarash Azarnia

item.title: Types of Performance Testing
item.description: Introduction Performance testing is one of the most important and common types of quality testing because performance is not a well-defined functional requirement, and exactly where is the beginning of the debate.

item.title: Contact
item.description: I always welcome new friends. My social links are available in the sidebar.

item.title: About
item.description: Hi! I am Kiarash, currently a student at the University of Tehran.
